lines.text: Profit Factor one point eight. What does that even mean?
Profit Factor equals total wins, divided by total losses.
One point zero is breakeven. One point five is decent. Two point zero plus is strong.
AlgoSphere flags any strategy below one point three. Do not trade it.
Above two point five, over one hundred trades. That is your green light.
Test your strategy. Free backtester. Link in bio.
